feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ¿A qué se debe que no pueda imprimir el PDF del mensaje de "Dar salida a mensajes de entrega"?
entry.content:
Siempre que hago un traspaso entre sucursales, no logro obtenér el PDF para hacer el picking

La forma es: con la operación ME21N y después VL10B

entry.title: How to add a new Entity & navigation property to standard cds: A_PurchaseContract?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am able to extend the CDS A_PurchaseContract with few loose field.  And this is working fine and getting visible on the table also.  Below is the cds code: 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZMMPURCEXT1'
@EndUserText.label: 'ZMM_PURC_EXT'
extend view A_PurchaseContract with ZMM_PURC_EXT 
association [1..1] to ZCDS_PURCHASEHEADER_LONGTEXT2 as _LongText
  on _LongText.PurchaseContract is not null
{
  _LongText.TextId ,
  _LongText.LongText
}

 

 

 

But, I need to extend the CDS A_PurchaseContract with a new EntitySet with the structure under a new Navigation Name: HdrText

 

 

 

HdrText:  [{
                LongTextId(C3),
                LongText(C50)
        }]

 

Kindly share the step-by-step approach on this.

Note: The class for your reference are:

* The main API is: API_PURCHASECONTRACT_SRV

 

Service: API_PURCHASECONTRACT_SRV
Classes: CL_API_PURCHASECONTRAC_DPC_EXT
         CL_API_PURCHASECONTRAC_MPC_EXT

 

Thanks,

Ramani Nagarajan

entry.title: What is the size limit of parameters in parameterized statements sent to the HANA client?
entry.content:
Hi, I discovered that there might be a size limit to parameters in general for parameterized statements sent to the HANA client via the node JS library.

I found a case where a very large JSON statement got truncated when sent to the HANA client and thus the SQL execution failed. I would like to determine what this size limit is for parameterized statements sent to the HANA client so that I can add a check for JSON params that exceed this limit.

entry.title: Creating QIP via QP02 runtime error encountered
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

I've encountered a runtime error when Creating QIP via QP02 while adding characteristic in IP. It happens on a standard FM QPSD_FEATURE_VERSION_READ - ITAB_DUPLICATE_KEY, do we have any existing sap notes regarding this?

Your help will be greatly appreciated!

Kind regards,

entry.title: table partition for 2 billion crossed table required steps to change 8 partitions from the default 4
entry.content:
we have observed when checking alerts on the PERSON_NAME Production System Tenant BPP.  Based on the below, the table in the alert won’t be able to accept any more inserts, so that will impact processing.  Things may have changed, but I believe re-partitioning—in this case to 8 partitions from the default 4—is an offline action, would like to know the pre steps for the partition and guidance to proceed further

 

attached table details 

SAPABAP1./BIC/FZ****_RPT partition (4) contains PHONE_*** records. A table partition cannot contain more than 2,147,483,648 (2 billion) rows.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2: "Ship-to Party is not assigned to Sold-to Party
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

In my code , I am facing an issue while creating a sales order using the BAPI BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 with minimal required data. Despite using the same partner number (17100002) for both Bill-to Party (BP) and Ship-to Party (SH), which I translate to WE and SH respectively after applying the explicit conversion exit, the BAPI returns the error: "Ship-to Party is not assigned to Sold-to Party".

Here's a summary of my observations and the steps I've taken:

  1. Direct BAPI Execution in SE37:

    • When I execute the BAPI directly in SE37 with the same parameters (without partner function conversion), the sales order is created successfully and gets committed without any errors.

  2. VA01 Transaction:

    • I replicated the same order using VA01, keeping the Sold-to and Ship-to parties the same as mentioned above. The order goes through successfully without any issues.

My Questions:

  1. SD Configuration:

    • Is there a specific SD configuration that allows specifying that the Bill-to/Ship-to partner must be the same partner for a specific customer? If so, how can I verify or modify this configuration?

  2. BAPI Parameters and Program Handling:

    • Given that the order is created successfully in SE37 and VA01, why does it not work when the BAPI is used inside ABAP code?

Your insights will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: wrong execution plan used
entry.content:
current PERSON_NAME revision is 2.00.072.

In production system we see queries usng the EXECUTION_ENGINE "COLUMN, ROW" instead of prefered "HEX" engine

With using the hint " ...with hint (USE_HEX_PLAN); " the query execution is much faster and using less memory

adding both planviz data, statement execution history and FSID to this ticket

I know , with PERSON_NAME SPS08 there are some bugs fixed in regards to HEX-usage, please check if this will be covered already, or an additional optimizer correction is required


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can I delete a specific certificate from trusted certificates list?
entry.content:
There are a few certificates in trusted certificates list.
How can I delete a specific certificate from the trusted certificates list?

entry.title: Product Costing-> Actual Costing , Standard Costing & Variances.
entry.content: Client need to run Actual Costing, Standard Costing & Variance, so that on the basis of variances they can do improvement in their processes. How to Process this in SAP.

entry.title: SAP HANA DB Audit Log Enable
entry.content:
Dear PERSON_NAME,
We need to enable PERSON_NAME DB Auditing in our Production Environment with full fill below requirements as per updated county's laws and Audit.
o when changes were made,
o who made those changes,
o what data was changed,


Also, How we can Archive and view the details.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Dispatcher does not start after Refresh database
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are currently carrying out System Refresh from  Production System to Test system using hana backup and recovery method.

We are currently able to restore & recover the Production backup on Test System. We have tried to restart the database & application .But we are unable to start the SAP application and disp+work is gray.

dev_w0 shows the below logs:

Sat Jul 20 12:39:55:886 2024
*** ERROR => Connect to database failed, rc=1, rcSQL=-10709
[dbhdbsql.cpp 620]
 SQLCODE : -10709
 SQLERRTEXT : Connection failed (RTE:[89009] Socket connect timeout (60000 ms) (192.168.212.250:21026 -> sappcopy:\
 30515))
 ***LOG R19=> ThDbConnect, db_connect () [thxxtool.c 6114]
 ThIErrHandle: in_ThErrHandle: 1
 *** ERROR => ThInit: db_connect (step TH_INIT, thRc ERROR-DB-CONNECT_ERROR, action STOP_WP, level 1) [thxxhead.c 2851]

 Info for wp 0

pid = 459367
 severity = 0
 status = 0
 stat = WP_NEW
 waiting_for = NO_WAITING
 workerType = DP_WORKER_DIAWP
 act_cs_count = 0
 csTrack = 0
 csTrackRwExcl = 0
 csTrackRwShrd = 0
 mode_cleaned_counter = 0
 control_flag = 0x1200000
 report = > <
 action = 0
 tab_name = > <

 ThIErrHandle: no current incoming request

 Entering TH_CALLHOOKS
 ThCallHooks: call hooks for event BEFORE_DUMP
 ThIErrHandle: entering PfStatReset
 ThIErrHandle: Entering DpRecoverMtxAfterProcessCrash
 DpRecoverMtxAfterProcessCrash: recover mutex after crash of W0
 ThIErrHandle: DpRecoverMtxAfterProcessCrash o.k.
 ThIErrHandle: do not call ThrCoreInfo (no_core_info=0, in_dynp_env=0)

 ***
 *** work process W0 died => ThInit: db_connect
 call ThrShutDown (1)...
 SigISetIgnoreAction : SIG_IGN for signal SIGUSR1
 SigISetIgnoreAction : SIG_IGN for signal SIGUSR2
EnqWorkProcess: Initializing enqueue client
 ***LOG Q02=> wp_halt2, halt wp () [dpuxtool.c 335]

 

Can you please help us on how to resolve this error?

I must add that after system rename(Changes the SAP system ID), the problem is solved and the application server starts. But we want to solve the problem without changing the system sid.

Your help in this regard will be highly appreciated.

With regards,

Maryam

SAP S/4HANA 

SAP HANA

entry.title: Configuration run in sales order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there is any confirguration/development related to the confirmation run and costing run in sales order.

my users don’t have access to va02 there fore i want to do development related to the configuration run, some times user forgot to take configuration run.

background job for configuration run or any sap standard configuration which through error if configuration or costing run is not taken.

thanks

entry.title: HANA engine depend on which factors ?
entry.content: I have restore SAP HANA VM clone and changed IPv4 but SAP control center not working to change DB IP

entry.title: Can the SAP HANA database schema users be converted to "restricted user"
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have the following three queries around HANA DB and SAP S/4 ECC/HANA:
1. Can the SAP HANA database schema users which SAP application uses to connect with HANA database be converted to "restricted user" as suggested in the article https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/f157e7b47b2a417a99eadd4b6c433b77/047d0187f27e46a19261c791a6e1d7a1.html?locale=en-US ?
2. If yes, will it mean that no one will be able to login to such schema users using SAP HANA studio or any other DB console while SAP will be able to operate normally, as it functioned before such change? i.e. the SAP application would still be able to access the database like earlier using such schema user accounts, but direct login access to such accounts would be blocked for other users
3. Which audit action(s) will log changes made to user types if configured in audit policies of HANA database?

SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP HANA

entry.title: how to transfer Site master with BP from S4HANA to ECC
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for a way to transfer site master along with BP from S4HANA Retail to ECC Retail. all comments are welcome. Thanks

entry.title: Data Validation in RAP web service with messages in response
entry.content:
Hi All,

I Have one scenario whare i have to validate some data using rap in odata web service. 

The data are coming in specific payload. I have to validate this data and if any error message is coming i have to send as response. This one is web Odata so i can not send messages as an error message. The all functionality i have to do in GET method only.

Any way to do this one?

sample payload

{
  "company_code" : "3N6R",
  "profit_center" : "",
  "trading_partner" : "",
  "gl_account" : "",
  "cost_center" : "",
  "internal_order" : "",
  "wbs_elements" : "",
  "Customer" : "",
  "Vendor" : "",
  "posting_date" : "\/Date(1721088000000)\/"
}

entry.title: APIs for backup and restore of SAP HANA cloud database
entry.content:
Hi experts,

do we have a SAP HANA cloud APIs that we can integrate with our scripts for hte backup and restore of the SAP HANA cloud database (PaaS)?

entry.title: SWPM SAPHANADB cannot be set during Primary Application Server installation
entry.content:
This is a new installation.
Installing S4Hana 2023 on Hana 2.0 using SWPM 2.0 sp18.
The ASCS was installed, the database installed and now installing the Primary Application Server.

In the define parameters phase it asks for the Database Schema password.
The schema name is already filled in and grayed out with SAPHANADB.
The guide says to just specify a password for SAPHANADB.
The schema does not yet exist in the database, as mentioned this is just the Define Parameters phase so nothing has been executed yet.

This error shows up:
The database connection with database user SAPHANADB cannot be set up. Check that the database is online and the password of user SAPHANADB is correct.

 

The installed database is up and available.

Have tried various iterations of password letters/numbers/length and also mimicked the basic password policy of the Master Password.
The install logs shows errors  INVALID_USER_PASSWORD and also 'authentication failed'.

Wondering if that's the actual error as the user doesn't exist yet, how can the password be invalid and authentication fail if it's just going to create the user?

Log excerpt with server name, port and SID mocked up.
Fri Jul 26 21:26:51 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Start new command section
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.core.jar | Changelist: 212394 | Release: lmts_027_REL | API-Version: 00
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.jar | Changelist: 213789 | Release: lmts_027_REL | API-Version: 35
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Name of HdbCmdClazz: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcDriver | URI: file:/tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/DISTRIBUTED/ABAP/APP1/ngdbc.jar
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Instance is a multiple-container system.
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Start new connection with connect URL: jdbc:sap://<server_name>.mikl.com:<port>/?databaseName=<SID> connect user: SAPHANADB
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible | HDBSLLIB Exception: [INVALID_USER_PASSWORD] com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.SQLInvalidAuthorizationSpecExceptionSapDB: [10]: authentication failed
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | End of HdbCmdClazz section: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | *************************************************************

Any feedback appreciated.

entry.title: disaster recovery server
entry.content:
we are using sap s4 hana 2021 with hana databse with 110 gb ..

what are the perquisites to create a replication server which we can use/Switch  in Emergency situations?

Physical server config should be Same ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
